summary: Migrated render loop from Canvas 2D stubs to Three.js WebGL rendering. ParticleField now creates a THREE.Points mesh with position/color BufferAttributes animated by bass (macro drift), treble (jitter), pointer disturbance, and time-based motion. WaveField creates a THREE.Group of THREE.Line objects with sine-wave vertices modulated by bass (amplitude), treble (shimmer), pointer disturbance, and cadence. Added cleanup() to GeometrySystem interface and both systems for proper GPU resource disposal on mode switch. Updated placeholder.ts to return lights for cleanup, renderLoop.ts to remove placeholder after geometry init, modeManager.ts to call cleanup on outgoing systems, scene.ts to add persistent ambient light, and main.ts to pass placeholder lights. All 443 tests pass including 32 new US-030 tests covering buffer updates, energy influences, pointer displacement, color derivation, cleanup, placeholder removal, and AC verification.
